node.html:
• Maintained the main eCommerce application

• Created and developed CI/CD automation pipelines for DevOps in Jenkins. With particular experience in code-quality/unit-testing webhooks with Sonarqube

• Remained strongly independent in tasks, and highly collaborative in scrum planning meetings

• Designed, developed and tested a fully-responsive web application built with AngularJS and MongoDB/Express, deployed on the Ethereum blockchain

• Assisted the continuous integration and automated deployment of our applications onto Google Cloud using Kubernetes and Docker containers

• Promptly and clearly communicated problems to all team members

• Contributed innovative ideas in project requirements and influenced business decisions

• The app won a national Vodafone Techstarter: ‘For-Profit, social tech’ award and was enlisted in Google Campus 2018 residency.

• Created designs for a student-events mobile application

• Worked alongside the founders to understand the direction of the company

• Constructed the alpha iOS application using Swift4 & Xcode 9

• Effectively reported progress in remote situations

• Assisted in a range of technical and non-technical projects, punctually meeting deadlines
